bullets: Officially licensed Sonic the Hedgehog collectible statue — Collector's Edition
Sonic depicted in a dynamic pose, revving up to run faster than the speed of sound
Base inspired by Green Hill Zone, featuring a rotating Star Post checkpoint (up to 90 degrees)
Includes Star Circle with bright LED functions for both the checkpoint bulb and Star Circle
content.description: The highly detailed Sonic PVC statue is seen striking a dynamic pose, revving up to run faster than the speed of sound. The base design is inspired by the Green Hill Zone, and on it is also the Star Post checkpoint, which you can rotate up to 90 degrees, allowing for multiple viewing angles. If you have 50 rings when reaching a checkpoint, a Star Circle will appear, which grants you access to a special level. The Collector’s Edition of this statue comes with the Star Circle and bright LED functions for both the checkpoint bulb and the Star Circle.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• SONIC THE HEDGEHOG: SONIC 11" PVC Collector’s Edition Painted statue
• Adjustable checkpoint with multi-mode LED functions
• Collectors Box
• F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
